# Leave Policy

Company policy governing employee leave entitlements and procedures.

Employees are entitled to 20 days annual leave per year.
Sick leave is separate and not deducted from annual entitlement.

## Annual Leave

- 20 days per calendar year
- Must be approved by line manager
- Minimum 2 weeks notice for leave exceeding 5 days
